description: Promote the design docs to current. Move .agent/targets/{type-naming,type-world,set-theoretic-types,protocols}.md into .agent/docs/ (they describe the now-current system); write the specs.md delta (construction seam reads TypeDefined, not a per-call ModuleTypeEnv) and the modules.md delta (NamespaceSymbol::Type; the namespace bridges type names too). The northstar Type-Naming section already landed; reconcile any drift. Verify: docs match the landed code -- present-tense, honest structures, no chronology.
title: Promote .agent/targets -> .agent/docs; specs.md/modules.md deltas; northstar reconcile
